summary: Iteration 8 - Comprehensive admin panel testing. All 11 sidebar tabs verified working: Hero Banner, About, Programs, Sessions, Testimonials, Stats, Newsletter, Header & Footer, Enrollments, Subscribers, Global Styles. All 17 backend API tests passed. Stats CRUD (POST/DELETE) working. Settings API with all new fields (hero, about, newsletter, footer, social, styles) working. Save Changes button functional on all settings tabs. Homepage correctly consumes settings from API.
critical_code_review_comments: All 11 admin tabs implemented and working: Hero Banner, About, Programs, Sessions, Testimonials, Stats, Newsletter, Header & Footer, Enrollments, Subscribers, Global Styles
Stats CRUD fully functional with POST and DELETE endpoints added
Site Settings model has all required fields: hero, about, newsletter, footer, social links, global styles, per-section overrides
Save Changes button present and functional on all settings-based tabs (hero, about, newsletter, header_footer, styles)
Homepage components (Header, Footer, About, Newsletter) correctly fetch and display settings from API
Enrollments tab shows toggle between Enrollments and Payments views with search functionality
Global Styles tab has font selectors, color pickers, size controls, and per-section style overrides
All data-testid attributes properly added for testing

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all 11 tabs, Save button, homepage settings integration working)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Admin panel has 11 tabs with modular tab components. Settings tabs (hero, about, newsletter, header_footer, styles) share Save Changes button. Content tabs (programs, sessions, testimonials, stats) have individual save/delete per item. Enrollments tab is read-only with toggle between enrollments and payments lists. Test file: /app/backend/tests/test_admin_panel_iteration8.py. Phone OTP is MOCKED. Key data-testids: admin-tab-{tabname}, hero-settings-tab, about-settings-tab, newsletter-settings-tab, header-footer-tab, global-styles-tab, enrollments-tab, save-settings-btn, add-program-btn, add-session-btn, add-testimonial-btn, program-row-{id}, session-row-{id}

mocked_features.phone_otp: MOCKED - OTP generated server-side, returned in API response for testing

sidebar_tabs.about: PASS - logo upload with size slider, about photo upload, all text fields (subtitle, name, title, bio paragraphs, button text/link)
sidebar_tabs.programs: PASS - list with visibility toggle, edit, delete, reorder arrows; add program form working
sidebar_tabs.sessions: PASS - list with visibility toggle, edit, delete, reorder; add session form working
sidebar_tabs.testimonials: PASS - list with visibility toggle, edit, delete; add form with graphic/video type selector
sidebar_tabs.stats: PASS - list with edit, delete; add stat form with value and label; POST/DELETE endpoints working
sidebar_tabs.newsletter: PASS - heading, description, button text, footer text inputs with live preview
sidebar_tabs.header_footer: PASS - 4 social media link fields, footer brand name, tagline, email, phone, copyright with preview
sidebar_tabs.enrollments: PASS - toggle between Enrollments (80) and Payments (17) views; search functionality working
sidebar_tabs.subscribers: PASS - shows subscriber list with email and date
sidebar_tabs.global_styles: PASS - heading/body font selectors with preview; color pickers for heading/body/accent; size controls; per-section overrides expandable

features_tested.save_changes_button: PASS - works on hero, about, newsletter, header_footer, styles tabs

homepage_settings_integration.header: PASS - social icons from settings displayed
homepage_settings_integration.about_section: PASS - name (Dimple Ranawat), title, bio, button from settings
homepage_settings_integration.newsletter_section: PASS - heading, description, button text from settings
homepage_settings_integration.footer: PASS - brand name, tagline, email, phone, copyright, social icons from settings
